10101010101100100011111011011111000100000011001100111001110001010010000000000 - ASI: 30

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  111 = 1 * 11
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0101 = 01 * 01
  1100 = 11 * 00
  01010 = 0101 * 0
  10101 = 1 * 0101
  11001 = 1100 * 1
  000100 = 00 * 0100
  011111 = 011 * 111
  1100100 = 11001 * 00
  00000000 = 0000 * 0000
  00001100 = 0000 * 1100
  011111011 = 011111 * 011
  110001010 = 1100 * 01010
  1010101010 = 10101 * 01010
  1100111001 = 11001 * 11001
  010000000000 = 0100 * 00000000
  011111000100 = 011111 * 000100
  10101010101100100 = 1010101010 * 1100100
  000011001100111001 = 00001100 * 1100111001
  011111011011111000100 = 011111011 * 011111000100
  110001010010000000000 = 110001010 * 010000000000
  10101010101100100011111011011111000100 = 10101010101100100 * 011111011011111000100
  000011001100111001110001010010000000000 = 000011001100111001 * 110001010010000000000
  10101010101100100011111011011111000100000011001100111001110001010010000000000 = 10101010101100100011111011011111000100 * 000011001100111001110001010010000000000
